description: Composition100% cotton shirt with half sleeves, has plaid checks in blue, with red-white accents, white stitch detailing, white-blue fabric tape on the in-seam of the collar, buttoned patch pockets on both chests with white thread detailing, buttoned shoulder flaps, full length buttoned placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this plaid shirt from locomotive. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
